 {"id":"caam-l19o.1.28","title":"Task: TUI preferences config + docs","description":"Goal
- Centralize all TUI-specific preferences (theme, motion, toasts, mouse, key hints, density) in a single config surface with clear precedence and docs.

Background
- The Glamorous TUI work introduces multiple toggles (NO_COLOR, reduced motion, toasts, mouse, non-TTY fallback). Without a unified config, defaults and overrides are inconsistent and hard to discover.

Details
- Add a `tui` section in the main config file with documented defaults.
- Provide CLI flags and env overrides for the most important toggles:
  - theme: auto|dark|light
  - high-contrast: bool
  - reduced-motion: bool
  - toasts: bool
  - mouse: bool
  - density: cozy|compact
  - show-key-hints: bool
  - no-tui: bool (force non-TTY mode)
- Define precedence order: CLI flags > env vars > config file > defaults.
- Add a `caam config tui` or `caam tui --help` section that prints the effective config.
- Update README and TUI help to document toggles and examples.
- Add structured debug logs showing resolved TUI config (redacting anything sensitive).

Success
- Users can reliably tune the TUI without hunting for hidden flags, and defaults remain sensible.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:32:35.509696063Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:06:29.063924688Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:06:29.063827274Z","close_reason":"Completed: Wired TUI model to use LoadTUIPreferences() from SPM config, added structured debug logging via slog showing resolved TUI preferences (theme, contrast, reduced_motion, toasts, mouse, key_hints, density, no_tui)","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.28","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:32:35.581840362Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"caam-l19o.1.29","title":"Task: TUI preferences config tests","description":"Goal
- Validate TUI config parsing, precedence rules, and toggle effects.

Details
- Unit-test precedence: CLI flags > env vars > config file > defaults.
- Verify each toggle changes behavior (theme selection, reduced motion disables spinners/toasts, no-tui fallback path, mouse enable/disable).
- Add fixtures for config file variations and missing fields.
- Emit structured test logs with resolved config values and source of each field.

Success
- Config behavior is deterministic and safe across environments.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:33:01.582831404Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T18:33:01.582831404Z","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.29","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:33:03.017453469Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.29","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1.28","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:34:22.058478023Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"caam-l19o.1.3","title":"Task: Modal overlays + focus rings","description":"Goal
- Render dialogs as true overlays with a dimmed background and clear focus indication.

Background
- Current dialog overlay discards the underlying view; there is no context or focus ring, which feels non-premium and disorienting.
- Skill guidance includes modal overlay patterns using lipgloss.Place/Overlay and double borders.

Details
- Implement an overlay that composes the dialog on top of the main view (retain background context).
- Add a subtle dim or desaturation layer to the background to emphasize focus.
- Use a premium border style for the active modal (double/thick) and a focused input cursor style.
- Clamp modal width/height to the viewport; support small-screen fallback.
- Add a keyboard hint line inside the modal with styled keycaps.

Tests
- Golden snapshots for modal overlay in compact + full layouts.
- Unit tests for size clamping and overlay positioning.
- E2E TUI test that opens dialogs and verifies background retention + focus ring.
- Structured test logs with modal dimensions and layout mode.

Success
- Dialogs feel modal, focused, and visually distinct without losing context.
","notes":"Depends on: caam-l19o.1.1 (theme system) and caam-ftpx (existing focus-indicator UX task).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:11:30.554154643Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T10:04:10.764394626Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T10:04:10.764394626Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.3","depends_on_id":"caam-ftpx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:11:37.459041520Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.3","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:11:30.555736562Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.3","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:11:34.189195020Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"caam-l19o.1.30","title":"Task: List + detail visual polish (rows, badges, hierarchy)","description":"Goal
- Make list rows and detail panels feel structured, scannable, and premium.

Background
- Current list rows are functional but visually flat; detail sections are dense and not clearly grouped.
- Glamorous TUI guidance emphasizes hierarchy, spacing, badges, and consistent row anatomy.

Details
- Standardize list row anatomy: left icon, primary label, secondary metadata, right-side status chip.
- Add subtle zebra striping or row separators; ensure selection + focus are clearly distinct.
- Use status badges (plan/status) with consistent colors and padding.
- Improve detail panel with labeled sections (Profile, Auth, Usage, Paths) using consistent spacing and divider rules.
- Right-align numeric values and keep units consistent (e.g., minutes, days, GB).
- Apply truncation rules with ellipsis for long names; show full value on focus where possible.

Tests
- Add golden snapshots for list rows + detail sections and truncation behavior (see caam-l19o.1.32).
- Emit structured test logs with row width, truncation decisions, and badge styles.

Success
- Lists are easy to scan, and details read like a structured card rather than a wall of text.
","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:33:28.040372461Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-23T04:19:34.096615497Z","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.30","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:33:28.093116193Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.30","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:34:24.676409938Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.30","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:34:28.460760142Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"caam-l19o.1.31","title":"Task: Header/branding + information architecture refresh","description":"Goal
- Add a premium header that anchors the TUI, improves navigation context, and makes the app feel intentional.

Background
- The current top area is minimal and does not reinforce context (active provider/profile/project) or brand identity.
- Glamorous TUI guidance recommends a clear header hierarchy with breadcrumbs and ambient context.

Details
- Create a top header row that includes: app name, short tagline or version, current provider/profile context, and a compact breadcrumb trail.
- Use subtle background tint/gradient-like styling via lipgloss (no harsh borders), with a clear typographic hierarchy.
- Ensure header collapses gracefully in compact layouts (e.g., two-line header or condensed chips).
- Keep header content dynamic based on current panel focus and selection.
- Ensure header styles integrate with the theme system and respect NO_COLOR.

Tests
- Add golden snapshots for header in compact + full layouts and different focus states.
- Emit structured test logs with header height, width, and layout mode.

Success
- Users immediately understand where they are and what is selected, even on first launch.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:33:42.488625028Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T21:55:56.056565892Z","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.31","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:33:42.491008987Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.31","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:34:31.140828088Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.31","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:34:35.031115192Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.31","depends_on_id":"caam-s5bk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:34:37.808692877Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"caam-l19o.1.32","title":"Task: List/detail rendering tests","description":"Goal
- Prevent regressions in list row anatomy and detail panel hierarchy.

Details
- Add golden snapshots for list rows (normal, selected, focused) and detail sections with badges.
- Include fixtures for long names, missing fields, and different plan/status combinations.
- Emit structured test logs with row width, truncation decisions, and badge styles.

Success
- Visual changes to lists/details are caught early and are easy to audit.

 {"id":"caam-l19o.1.33","title":"Task: Charm v2 readiness (Bubble Tea/Lip Gloss/Bubbles)","description":"Goal
- Track upcoming Charm v2 changes and prepare a safe upgrade plan once stable.

Background
- Bubble Tea v2 is in release candidate; Lip Gloss v2 is beta; Bubbles v2 is in alpha. These releases may change APIs and styling behavior.

Details
- Audit current TUI usage against v2 API changes (model update signatures, tea.Cmd patterns, lipgloss layering changes).
- Build a compatibility matrix and identify necessary refactors.
- Add a `TUI_CHARM_V2` feature flag to test compatibility without forcing upgrade.
- Only upgrade once v2 releases are stable; keep v1 pinned in the meantime.

Tests
- Add a CI job that builds against v2 (allow-failure) to surface incompatibilities.
- Maintain a small compatibility test suite to pin expected behaviors.

Success
- We can upgrade to Charm v2 with controlled risk when stable.
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:55:27.629622075Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T21:55:08.993546293Z","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"caam-l19o.1.33","depends_on_id":"caam-l19o.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T18:55:27.631404171Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
